description: A designed slogan graphic on a light blue gradient background that is faintly watermarked with the circular seal text 'U.S. DEPARTMENT OF HOMELAND SECURITY'. The headline at top, in large dark-navy type, reads 'Break our laws,' on the first line (bold) and 'lose your privilege.' on the second (italic). Centered below are images of two official immigration documents shown as specimens: an upper card is a 'UNITED STATES OF AMERICA PERMANENT RESIDENT' green card (surname 'SPECIMEN', given name 'TEST V', USCIS# 000-000-310, Category IR1, with a Statue of Liberty / flag design and a sample photo), and a lower card is an 'IMMIGRANT VISA' issued by the 'US CONSULATE GENERAL LONDON' (surname 'TRAVELER', IV Case Number LND2004I6000201, Registration Number 00000473). Both documents are deliberately blurred/pixelated over the personal-data fields. The minimalist, official-looking design uses the DHS color palette and seal to convey government authority. The propaganda/messaging technique is a blunt deterrent warning: lawful status is a revocable 'privilege', and lawbreaking will cost an immigrant their green card or visa, reinforcing the tweet's list of revocation triggers. Target audience: immigrants and visa/green-card holders.
notable_text: Break our laws, lose your privilege.; PERMANENT RESIDENT; IMMIGRANT VISA; SPECIMEN / TEST V; US CONSULATE GENERAL LONDON
